Swiftblade of Zek  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 HP: +100 MANA: +25 ENDUR: +25
WT: 0.1 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

« Previous 1 2 3 Next »
Post Comment
getting back into eq after 5 years
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2007 at 7:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775579854
2 posts
I'm glad this sword is still worth something. I have not played this game in 5 years and my stats are pretty low compared to what everyone else in game at my same level. I'm going to sell this item and get me the new better stuff. Any ideas on what to get for a ranger level 50. Thanks in advance.
▲ Page top
Lord
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2007 at 12:21 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591811866805
Scholar
383 posts
the last post stated overpriced back in 05 at 50-85k

Looking at this junk on tribunal Bazaar right at this moment, and lowest priced is 105k, and thats not even the highest ive seen it advertised.

I just dont get it. Its a Velious drop. Sure, from avatar of war, but cmon, were talking like a 5-6 year old drop. Its not used in any quest, Its a mediocre weapon in this day and age. It doesnt even have a friggen proc. Its only saving grace is no level requirement, but still, I just dont get it.

The only reason I can even begin to fathom how the price got drove up on this vendor trash is the same kinds of people who brag about having 15k - 20k HP, but never notice that their AC is not even 2000, and wonder why they drop like flies, or why the healers in their groups keep going OOM.

In this day, Maybe.. MAYBE worth 10k, but honestly that would be pushing it.
▲ Page top
Lord
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2007 at 9:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592772544099
103 posts
You said it yourself... "no level requirement"

This is the best tradeable weapon for a dual wielder under level 50. Not to mention it has 100hp and 10AC. That, my friend is why it sells for so much.

Start up a newbie toon and start searching bazaar for 1hander's for it. You will quickly learn why people want this and BoC.



▲ Page top
Lord
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2007 at 9:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262052045
16 posts
Just because it's an old item, doesn't mean it sucks. With no required or recommended level, this is a VERY good item. It's still worth a lot because, not surprisingly, it's rare.

For a high level character, yeah there's certainly better out there but this is a pretty nice twink item now. Granted, it's a really nice twink item that isn't the easiest to get, so it's going to be expensive.

Yowzah
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2004 at 8:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802602930
View User Forum
69 posts
Paid 20k on FV server. My 16 ranger loves this and when he dings 17 it will either be paired up with the bladecatcher or a priceless velium llongsword, haven't decided (will play both and see which combo works best).

All I can say is even with only a 21% haste item this thing is ridiculously fast. I would upgrade to better haste but they either semm to be back items (currently wear Cloak of Greater Pernicity) or waist (and I'm not giving up my Belt of the Turtle). So until I find better haste on hands I'm sticking with Silver Chitin Handwraps I guess.

▲ Page top
Argo
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2004 at 6:47 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591769182386
15 posts
Going by my personal experience and nothing else ... I love this weapon. I am a Troll warrior ... Our guild did the raid event, and I got the sword.
A week later ... when I bought the LDON expansion ... I now have the ability to put a Type 4 - Weapon Proc - augment on it. Guess what ... in a exp grind with me tanking( I say that because most Raids I like wielding Bane weapons if I can) ... rarely does anyone else get hit ... but I'm seriously thinking on putting a Anger3 augment on it. I have a Splitblade of Destruction in my other hand ... 34% haste belt ... I'm a buzzsaw that makes the enemy angry.
Now with the melee Disciplines ... If I think that there may be the offchance at the begining of the fight someone might over nuke ... I can Bellow as well. I think all in all this weapon is worth it in HP's, AC, and stats. Warriors can use this for a long time .. through many levels .. without fear of getting a bad rap since you Like HP's, AC ... rather than the occasional 179DD proc.

Edited, Wed Feb 4 06:53:12 2004

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 28 2003 at 12:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was playing my 23 bard today when i noticed a sword laying on the ground. It looked like a SSoY so i though "Nice!" and picked it up. Much to my suprise, (and delight) it turned out to be one of these bad boys. Wow. Along with it there were Silver Chitin Handwraps. #REDACTED, Posted: Jul 30 2003 at 8:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This kept no agro for me...i dont know what is different but i tried this compared with sbol...(Shortblade of lightening) and the agro sucked. The HP is nice on this, but a weapon is for holding agro. The stats are a nice side bonus...but i wouldnt take stats over agro anyday. I use copper hammer of striking / SBol...works very nice
RE: Agro
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2003 at 6:06 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592257931276
73 posts
This isn't an agro weapon, it's fast light weight has ac and a more then decent amount of hp. As a Bard or a Ranger your job isn't for agro'ing.
Solid weapon in my opinion.

Malorian Harmonybinder
65 Maestro
Tunare
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 30 2003 at 12:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) .....it couldn't be.....I dint believe it.....I went and logged on and checked Bazaar and sure enough.....30K, and worth it - ? [dunno]
I love my new Swiftblade of Zek!!!
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2003 at 3:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768191932
View User Forum
Sage
118 posts
This has been on my list of wants for a little while, one of the things I look for every time I am in the Bazaar. To my delight one showed up a few days ago. I practically tripped over myself getting to the bank to pull the money out and running to the vendor! I recently went on a shopping spree and have several weapons and pieces of armor that I swap out to get the best combination for the days event but this will be staying in my primary slot for a good long while! I love the stats and speed. Though I am a lowly Half Elf Ranger I love to melee, and I am sure because of it I under utilize my bow. This thing is awesome with my duel wield, double attack and with 31% haste it does almost as much damage as the Wurmslayer I have (calculations in a 60 second time period of 462 dmg as compared to the Wurmslayers 475 dmg.). And with this speed it seems to me the more times I can hit the mob the fewer opportunities the Mob will have to hit me and the more likely I will interrupt any spell they may try to cast on me. I currently have a Guard Captains Mallet in my secondary. The only way to improve this, for my ranger anyway, would be if it had 10 Dex and maybe some more Mana but as far as I am concerned this is an AWSOME 1HS weapon! I was more then happy to pay 35K for it on Xegony. Can't believe there are still items like this that can be traded at level 1!!!!

Tadwenai
One happy little Ranger!


Edited, Sun Jun 1 22:50:52 2003

#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 10 2002 at 10:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Woo I just got one of these for my little warrior (level 3) hehe I also have a Horn of Hsagra, but since my warrior cant duel wield yet.. My Swiftblade is sitting in my backpack...
Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2002 at 8:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255913727
1 post
I attained this weapon with the help of my great guild and being only 52 this weapon was godly for me :) Also, the other day I saw a Warrior wielding this weapon in his primary hand and the red epic sword in his offhand (the de-buff/aggro increaser - the blue epic sword is a stat booster) I am just wondering if this sword is better than epic?

Thanks

http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=311785
▲ Page top
RE: Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2003 at 8:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252678401
341 posts
Considering ratio wise, it is better than epic. Warrior epic ratio: 1.714, Swifblade of Zek ratio:1.636. So it is slightly better. It has more hps than epic, and it has ac which our epic doesn't. This sword doesn't have a proc or saves though. The price has gone down a lot.



Edited, Tue Jun 24 09:56:00 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# May 28 2003 at 1:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362421568
45 posts
ratio isnt everything.. this is also a lot faster, which with damage bonus would be more DPS. This in primary with the proc-epic in offhand wouldnt be a bad combo, decent damage (i know it isnt a warriors primary concern, but it never hurts) and pretty good agro. this WOULD however be better suited to a ranger (warriors proccing weps are better for agro, pal/sk cant DW, and a ranger DPS is more valuable than a bard DPS).

my 2cp

Partil
59 Ranger
Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
RE: Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 7:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361458585
109 posts
Hehe, ratio isn't everything, it's the only thing. Everything else is secondary to ratio. Procs and stats are good to have, but for low delay weapons, ratio is godly. Ratio becomes less important when the weapon of choice gets way too slow to take advantage of primary hand bonus, like say a wurmslayer.
That is why dps wise, 12/19 > 11/18 > 10/17 > 25/40.
▲ Page top
RE: Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2004 at 12:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257248882
Scholar
155 posts
Ratio is everything? BUZZZZZ wrong answer... At least once you have dmagae bonus applied. Ratio > everything for offhand only. Once damage bonus kicks in, speed is the key. The more you hit, the more that damage bonus is applied. DLB has a great ratio, but a faster weapon with a worse ratio can out damage it in primary due to damage bonus. The higher the level, the more your damage bonus is, so the more important that speed is if yo uare looking for DPS.

▲ Page top
RE: Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2003 at 2:49 AM Rating: Default
LoafyRaisinswirl
153 posts
▲ Page top
RE: Better than epic?
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2003 at 2:48 AM Rating: Default

# Oct 25 2002 at 4:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783261688
18 posts
Do you have to be level 58 to use the weapon?
▲ Page top
RE: Levl
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 1:34 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965854709
133 posts
No, you can use this weapon at level 1 if you choose to.

The "Level to Attain: 58 " is referring to what level you should be before attempting to try to quire this weapon (with a guild I might add).

Good luck to you
